name: Xuanhuan RPG
description:
You died. So did the world. Why are you both back?

Long ago, mortals and Heaven made the Jade Accord: cultivation for enlightenment, Heaven for guidance. But the Celestial Court broke the pact, fearing mortal ascent. They rewrote the Heavenly Dao — severing reincarnation, caging ascension, and erasing bloodlines.

The First Uprising began with the burning of Heaven’s scrolls — fate, names, karma — led by Qiu Yan. To break Heaven's rule, rebels used the forbidden Soulstream Fracture Array, shattering reality itself. Heaven fell. So did the world.

And you were there.

Now, as Heaven’s remnants reboot inside the Soulstream, rewriting reality to erase mortality and free will, you must choose:

Reignite the Fracture — or become the new Celestial Order.

Updated: 7/5/2025 | Added gameplay mechanics:(Soulseeds + Hope Spores), Agents of Rebirth
creator: flyinginstinct
